homePage.heroSubtitle: Explore learning paths, track progress, and climb the leaderboard — all in one place.

leaderboardPage.title: Leaderboard
leaderboardPage.subtitle: See who is leading the learning charts this period.

topUpPage.title: Top up coins
topUpPage.subtitle: Choose a coin package. Prices are shown in your active locale currency.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: A small boost for your next roadmap unlock.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: More coins for multiple learning paths.

checkout.title: Confirm checkout
checkout.description: This is a preview checkout simulation. No real payment is processed.

explorePage.categoriesDescription: Pick a field and dive into structured learning paths.
explorePage.trendingDescription: Popular paths learners are exploring right now.
explorePage.subcategoriesDescription: Choose a topic to see available roadmaps.
explorePage.roadmapsDescription: Select a roadmap to start learning.

roadmaps.frontendFundamentalsDesc: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript essentials for web development.
roadmaps.reactMasteryDesc: Component patterns, hooks, and state management with React.
roadmaps.nodejsBasicsDesc: Build APIs and server-side apps with Node.js.
roadmaps.flutterStarterDesc: Cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter and Dart.
roadmaps.figmaWorkflowDesc: Design systems and prototyping in Figma.

roadmapPage.learningPathDescription: Click a node to view study materials.

htmlBasics.title: HTML Basics
htmlBasics.description: Learn semantic HTML tags and document structure.
htmlBasics.material: Study the core HTML elements: headings, paragraphs, lists, links, and forms. Practice building a simple landing page skeleton.

cssLayout.title: CSS Layout
cssLayout.description: Master flexbox, grid, and responsive design.
cssLayout.material: Review modern CSS layout techniques and build responsive card layouts that adapt from mobile to desktop.

javascriptIntro.title: JavaScript Intro
javascriptIntro.material: Learn JS fundamentals and connect button interactions to update the DOM without a framework.

componentsProps.title: Components & Props
componentsProps.material: Break UI into components and pass data through props with TypeScript interfaces.

hooksState.title: Hooks & State
hooksState.description: Manage local state with useState and useEffect.
hooksState.material: Practice controlled inputs, derived state, and side effects in functional components.

dataFetching.title: Data Fetching
dataFetching.description: Load remote data in React apps.
dataFetching.material: Fetch JSON from mock endpoints and render loading and empty states.

nodeRuntime.title: Node Runtime
nodeRuntime.description: Understand the event loop and modules.
nodeRuntime.material: Explore CommonJS vs ESM modules and how Node handles async I/O.

expressApi.title: Express API
expressApi.material: Build CRUD routes, middleware, and basic error handling for a mock API.

dartBasics.title: Dart Basics
dartBasics.material: Learn Dart types, collections, and null-safe patterns used in Flutter.

widgetTree.title: Widget Tree
widgetTree.material: Practice stateless vs stateful widgets and layout with Column, Row, and ListView.

designTokens.title: Design Tokens
designTokens.material: Define token libraries in Figma and apply them across components.

prototyping.title: Prototyping
prototyping.material: Link screens with transitions and annotate specs for developers.

numpyPandas.title: NumPy & Pandas
numpyPandas.material: Load datasets, clean missing values, and compute summary statistics.

modelTraining.title: Model Training
modelTraining.description: Train and evaluate a simple classifier.
modelTraining.material: Split data, fit a baseline model, and review accuracy metrics.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join the platform and start exploring roadmaps.
register.name: Full name

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

profilePage.title: Your profile
profilePage.subtitle: Manage your account and review your coin activity.
profilePage.accountDescription: Preview data for your static authenticated session.
profilePage.historyDescription: Recent top-ups and spending from mock data.
